title: Seeing a GP at a clinic
description: Describe your symptoms to a doctor at a private clinic in Hong Kong
context: Most Hong Kongers see private GPs (私家醫生) for minor illness — it's quick and affordable compared to public hospitals. Clinics are usually in the ground floor of residential blocks. Register at reception, wait your turn, then see the doctor for 5-10 minutes.
culturalFact: Hong Kong's public healthcare system is heavily subsidised — a visit to a public hospital outpatient clinic costs around HK$50 (about £5). However, public waiting times can be very long, so most people choose private GPs for anything non-urgent.

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 醫生你好，我喉嚨痛，又發燒。
lines.jyutping: ji1 sang1 nei5 hou2, ngo5 hau4 lung4 tung3, jau6 faat3 siu1.
lines.english: Hello doctor, I have a sore throat and I have a fever.

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 尋日開始，今朝起身覺得好辛苦。
lines.jyutping: cam4 jat6 hoi1 ci2, gam1 ziu1 hei2 san1 gok3 dak1 hou2 san1 fu2.
lines.english: It started yesterday. This morning when I woke up I felt really unwell.

lines.speaker: doctor
lines.jyutping: jau5 mou5 kat1? jau5 mou5 tou5 tung3?

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: jau5 siu2 siu2 kat1, tou5 tung3 mou5.
lines.english: A little cough, no stomach pain.

lines.speaker: doctor
lines.cjk: 係上呼吸道感染，開三日藥俾你。要多休息，多飲水。
lines.jyutping: hai6 soeng6 fu1 kap1 dou6 gam2 jim5, hoi1 saam1 jat6 joek6 bei2 nei5. jiu3 do1 jau1 sik1, do1 jam2 seoi2.
lines.english: It's an upper respiratory infection. I'll prescribe three days of medicine. Get plenty of rest and drink lots of water.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: jiu3 m4 jiu3 beng6 gaa3 zi2?
lines.english: Do I need a sick leave certificate?

lines.speaker: doctor
lines.cjk: 要㗎話我知，我寫俾你。請護士幫你拎藥。
lines.jyutping: jiu3 ga3 wa6 ngo5 zi1, ngo5 se2 bei2 nei5. cing2 wu6 si6 bong1 nei5 ling1 joek6.
lines.english: Just let me know and I'll write one. Please ask the nurse to get your medicine.
